sn4.4:1.1:
1
Thus have I heard. On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Baraṇasi in the Deer Park at Isipatana. There the Blessed One addressed the bhikkhus thus: "Bhikkhus!"
sn4.4:1.2: "Venerable sir!" those bhikkhus replied. The Blessed One said this:
sn4.4:1.3:
2
"Bhikkhus, by careful attention, by careful right striving, I have arrived at unsurpassed liberation, I have realized unsurpassed liberation. You too, bhikkhus, by careful attention, by careful right striving, must arrive at unsurpassed liberation, must realize unsurpassed liberation."
sn4.4:1.4: Then Māra the Evil One approached the Blessed One and addressed him in verse:
sn4.4:1.5:
3
"You are bound by Māra's snare
Both celestial and human;
You are bound by Māra's bondage:
You won’t escape me, ascetic!"
